name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement standard terms for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, containing fillable fields for party details, purpose, term, and governing law.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement standard terms covering SaaS product access, payment, security, liability, and intellectual property.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement standard terms defining uptime targets, response times, service credits, and remedies.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper Design Partner Agreement standard terms for early product access in exchange for feedback and program participation.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper Professional Services Agreement standard terms governing consulting, deliverables, intellectual property, and payment.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement standard terms for GDPR-compliant processing of personal data, including subprocessors and cross-border transfers.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper Partnership Agreement standard terms covering cooperation obligations, trademark licensing, payment, and confidentiality between business partners.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper Software License Agreement standard terms for on-premise or installable software licensing, maintenance, and support.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper Pilot Agreement standard terms for time-limited product evaluation and trial access before entering a definitive agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper Business Associate Agreement standard terms for HIPAA-compliant handling of protected health information (PHI).

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper AI Addendum standard terms supplementing an existing agreement with provisions for AI services, model training, input/output ownership, and disclaimers.
